findings.evidence: `map_proj` is the only lemma that extracts the subgroup membership condition (φ.2 e) into a usable equation; `mapsTo_fiber`, `mapsTo_fiber_symm`, and `fiberHomeomorph` (lines 60, 67, 73) all already use `map_proj` internally via `simp`/`rw` — downstream consumers would likewise need `simp` to apply it automatically.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` before `lemma map_proj` so `simp` can normalize `p (φ.1 e)` to `p e`
findings.issue: `map_proj` (p (φ.1 e) = p e) is the defining property of deck transformations but is not annotated `@[simp]`

summary: The API surface is appropriately minimal for Stage 0.4, but the characteristic elimination lemma `map_proj` (Deck.lean line 54) lacks `@[simp]`, forcing users to rewrite manually when simplifying `p (φ.1 e)` to `p e`.
